action.reasoning: Observation: The 0.55/0.45 ensemble is the new best at mean_r2=0.49891, slightly improving over 0.65/0.35 and 0.75/0.25; gains came from temperature and q while precipitation declined slightly. Analysis: The ensemble-weight sweep still shows improving mean_r2 as the resume model weight increases up to 0.45, and a simple quadratic fit from the last three evaluated weights suggests an optimum near a 0.50 resume weight. This is a low-cost inference-only experiment with no risk to the saved best. Decision: Create and evaluate a 0.50/0.50 ensemble checkpoint with the same q-only clamp metadata.
